violations.description: Person in charge. — --- Certified food service manager had an expired certificate.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Food in walk in cooler and refrigerator not labeled and date marked.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as needed. - Reach-in coolers and freezers in need of cleaning. Food crumbs collecting below shelves.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Observed most items in walk in cooler and refrigerator were not date marked.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Observed towel under griddle that is not a cleanable surface.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Observed nozzles on soda dispenser needs to be cleaned.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
